name: Island of Sifnos Honey Bread
recipeIngredient: 1.25 lb Ricotta cheese, unsalted (or unsalted Mizithra)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the flour with warm water to form a dough similar to bread.
2. Add butter, salt, and baking powder. Knead and set aside.
3. In another bowl, mix ricotta cheese and sugar. Add honey and a handful of flour. Beat in eggs and half the cinnamon until well combined.
4. Butter a pan large enough for the dough to fit when rolled out. Roll the dough into a round shape that fits over the edges of the pan.
5. Spread the mixture evenly over the dough.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 30 minutes, or until golden brown.
7. Sprinkle the remaining cinnamon on top.
8. Cut the bread into diamond-shaped pieces once it is cooled slightly.
Source: TSELEMENTES
Translated and posted by: George Righos
Meal-Master format by Karen Mintzias
